special_note: Requires French customs invoice attached to every shipment
All packages must include itemized packing list per store policy

Include handwritten thank you card with every order
Shipments must clear UK customs with HS code declared accurately

Split orders exceeding 50 units into two separate shipment boxes
Fragile items must be double-boxed before handoff to courier
All shipments require Certificate of Origin for import clearance
Request signature confirmation on all deliveries above 500 USD

Gift wrapping required for all items marked as boutique display stock
Include product care card in English inside every jewelry box
Bulk orders must include master carton with individual item barcodes
